item.title: Feeling of the day: gods fucking dammit
item.description: So, i am sitting at home, bc one of my employers thought it pruedent to not employ me anymore. I am working in special ed. Seems like the bottom line is more im portant than he care for the kids. I am in the employ of three different institutions, doing similar work with the same kids. - That's just how it needs to be done. But today, i was given notice, that my work is no longer needed, bc i am too expensive. just a small FYI: I am payed through a statefunded educational fund. I have seen - and been told by now former colleagues - my replacement. they are two young, barely adult ppl, being paid through a differnet institution. they are by all metrics way less qualified than me. and i can not get rid of the feeling, that this is somehow related to my salary. This part of my job was never the most demanding, but i loved it, and the kids did, too. Now it becomes even more of a kids herding operation.
item.dc:creator: JackHL01

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump Of Pure Chaos
item.description:
1. So here all the sand in the world!
2. Female mating dance caught on camera in the wild
3. Thank me later!
4. Me: 'I'm not scared of anyone!' Also me when I see her: 'Uh... let's talk this out?
5. Am I too late with the Barbenhaimer memes
6. My heart is broken for these poor victims
7. Stand your ground!
8. The anxiety build is insane!
9. Go to a haunted house, it will be fun....
10. Sharks when they finally evolve to walk on land
11. Just dog hat, very fashionable in Europe, I hear
12. I'm not sure what the point of this video was, but I like pretty Batman lady
13. HEYYY! I needed that!
14. Yes, I'm here for the Lumber Facts and nothing else
15. Here is a blooper from the game I'm currently working. If you have the time please help out with wishlist on Steam because it's the only game that almost had a Hitler Toaster in it (yeah, I know, bad idea). But don’t worry, there’s still plenty of absurdity left! Your wishlist is toast-ally going to make my day: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I live in the PNW, and struggle with the end of summer. A visit to MRNP always gets me in a fall mood.

item.title: Last 2 weeks... sister had another health scare (but turned out okay) then Hurricane Helene hit us HARD. We just got back our power, internet, and cellular service. Been running a generator for 48hrs straight to keep our basement from flooding. Holy shit.
item.description: Source: Top Gun: Maverick (2022) #intergalacticqualitygifs (Check WiFi) Yes, I live in North Carolina. Yes, where the bad shit just happened.
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax
